title: centaurea × jonasii
intro: Centaurea × jonasii, also known as Jonas' centaurea or Centaurea jonasii, is a hybrid plant species in the Asteraceae family, which is a cross between Centaurea solstitialis and Centaurea scabiosa. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Centaurea × jonasii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a useful herb for treating various skin conditions and infections. Centaurea × jonasii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in traditional medicine to support skin health and immune function.
